backend/main.mo: Main ICP actor defining the backend for a service desk app, including data types and CRUD operations for clients, jobs, parts, labor rates, user profiles, signatures, and Stripe payment integration with role-based access control.
backend/migration.mo: Trivial migration module that accepts an empty state and returns an empty state, serving as a no-op schema migration placeholder.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping completed feature fixes (client create form, inventory add/edit part flows, etc.) to their affected files, component dependencies, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key implementation details of every page, hook, and component in the app.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes covering background, foreground, card, primary, chart, and sidebar color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React app titled 'Reliable Home Appliance Repair LLC Service Desk' that mounts the app at the `#root` div and loads the Vite entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Defines the TanStack Router route tree for the entire app, registering all static and dynamic routes (clients, jobs, inventory, invoice, calendar, settings, login, profile-setup) with static routes declared before their dynamic counterparts.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: App shell component with a sticky header, scrollable main content area, and a fixed bottom navigation bar; handles auth redirects to login or profile-setup based on identity and profile state.
frontend/src/components/SignatureCapture: A React component that renders a canvas-based signature pad, allowing users to draw, save, or skip their signature using the useSignaturePad hook and useStoreUserSignature mutation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries whenever the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook that manage Internet Identity authentication state (login, logout, identity persistence) via the DFINITY AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks (queries and mutations) for interacting with the ICP backend, covering user profiles, signatures, clients, jobs, parts, labor rates, and estimates.
frontend/src/hooks/useSignaturePad.ts: A hook that attaches mouse and touch drawing event listeners to a canvas ref, providing clear and getSignatureBytes utilities along with an isEmpty state flag.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens in both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider into the DOM root.
frontend/src/pages/CalendarPage.tsx: Weekly calendar view that displays jobs grouped by EST day, with drag-and-drop reordering, cost breakdowns (diagnostic fee, labor, tax), and navigation controls to move between weeks.
frontend/src/pages/ClientDetailPage.tsx: Form page for creating or editing a single client record (name, email, phone, address, notes, Google review URL), using React Query mutations and navigating back to the clients list on save.
frontend/src/pages/ClientsPage.tsx: Searchable list page that displays all clients with phone, address, and a Google review shortcut button, and allows navigation to the client detail/edit page.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Dashboard overview showing metric cards (total jobs, open, in-progress, complete, clients) and a recent-jobs list, with owner-only sections for labor rates and financial summaries.
frontend/src/pages/InventoryPage.tsx: Parts inventory management page supporting inline add, edit, and delete operations for parts (name, part number, description, quantity, unit cost), restricted to owner users.
frontend/src/pages/InvoicePreviewPage.ts: Renders a printable/downloadable invoice preview for a given job, including parts, labor line items, tax calculation, and a client signature pad that captures a local-only PNG signature.
frontend/src/pages/JobDetailPage.tsx: Full CRUD detail page for a single job (or new job creation), managing form state for client, status, notes, labor line items, parts, and photo attachments via the backend actor.
frontend/src/pages/JobsPage.tsx: Lists all jobs grouped and filterable by status (Open, In Progress, Complete), displaying each as a card with client name, date, and status badge, with a button to create a new job.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Authentication page that uses Internet Identity to log in, redirects to home on success, and displays a branded UI with loading and error states.
frontend/src/pages/ProfileSetupPage.tsx: Two-step onboarding page where a new user enters their name and optionally draws a signature, saving the profile via a mutation before navigating home.
frontend/src/pages/SettingsPage.tsx: Settings page for managing labor rates (create, edit, delete) and configuring Stripe integration; owner-only Stripe fields are gated by principal check, with a logout option.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes. Supports sessionStorage-backed persistence and safe removal of sensitive params (e.g., admin tokens) from the address bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a custom design system with OKLCH color tokens, Inter/Rajdhani fonts, custom shadows, border radii, and animations (accordion, fade-in). Includes typography, container-queries, and tailwindcss-animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state document (version 33) tracking the architecture, known issues, and existing features of a single-canister ICP service desk app for Reliable Home Appliance Repair LLC. Records incremental build history, owner principal details, role-based access design, and outstanding bugs.
